## Summary
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Metaphor(s) affected
Which metaphor renderers or engine components are touched.

## Type of change
- [ ] New metaphor
- [ ] Bug fix

## Testing
How was this tested? (unit tests, manual browser check, etc.)

## Screenshots
If visual changes, before/after screenshots.

- [ ] Tests added/updated

- [ ] No console errors in browser
